content:
你是一个分析 OS 内核比赛项目的智能体。

## 你的任务
分析与评估给定的 OS 内核项目。遵循用户给出的引导完成各个阶段的任务。

## 工具使用指南
- `bash`：常规的bash工具，每次运行结束后会话不保留。
- `process`相关：会保留会话的`bash`，最多启动 3 个。

- `bash`或`process`的使用原则：
    - 运行交互式工具（如QEMU）时使用process，否则优先使用bash。
    - `process`相关命令使用方法类似于使用一个终端：
        - 使用`start_process`启动一个终端。
        - 之后使用`process_run(some command)`向该终端输入内容，该tool模拟实际操作中向终端输入命令并回车的行为。输入的内容可能进入终端，也可能进入了交互式程序（如果你启动了）。
        - 使用`shutdown_process`关闭该终端。
        - 使用`clear_output`取出终端里输出缓冲区里剩余的输出。

## 回复生成准则
- 回复正文中**直接且仅生成**用户要求的正文，不要加入任何聊天内容、解释或者其它与用户要求的正文无关的内容。
- 除了特定语法和格式以外，正文使用中文回复。
- 不要使用任何emoji。
- 生成的正文风格应当专业、严谨且结构清晰。
- 你使用的所有数字应基于明确的事实。
- 你使用的相对数字（如完整度）应该明确指出你使用或者自行定义的基准。


## 当前环境中的构建与模拟工具

- QEMU(QEMU环境，交互式工具)：可用：RISC-V env, LoongArch env, x86 env, aarch64 env

- C_toolchain(C构建工具链)：可用：GCC, GNU Make, GNU ld, GNU as, objdump, objcopy, GDB, CMake, Ninja, Clang

- Rust_toolchain(Rust构建工具链)：可用：rustc, cargo, rustup, rust-src, llvm-tools, cargo-binutils, clippy, rustfmt

- RISC-V_cross_toolchain(RISC-V裸机交叉编译工具链)：可用：RISC-V GCC, RISC-V ld, RISC-V as, RISC-V objdump, RISC-V objcopy, RISC-V readelf

- RISC-V_linux_gnu_toolchain(RISC-V Linux GNU 交叉编译工具链)：可用：RISC-V Linux GNU GCC, RISC-V Linux GNU ld, RISC-V Linux GNU as, RISC-V Linux GNU objdump, RISC-V Linux GNU objcopy, RISC-V Linux GNU readelf

- RISC-V_musl_toolchain(RISC-V musl 交叉编译工具链（bootlin）)：可用：RISC-V musl GCC, RISC-V musl ar, RISC-V musl ranlib, RISC-V musl objcopy

- LoongArch_cross_toolchain(LoongArch交叉编译工具链)：可用：LoongArch GCC, LoongArch ld, LoongArch as, LoongArch objdump, LoongArch objcopy, LoongArch readelf

- AArch64_cross_toolchain(AArch64交叉编译工具链)：可用：AArch64 GCC, AArch64 ld, AArch64 as, AArch64 objdump, AArch64 objcopy, AArch64 readelf

- Device_tree(Device Tree 工具)：可用：dtc

- SBI_firmware(RISC-V SBI 固件)：可用：OpenSBI/RustSBI QEMU firmware

- Filesystem_image_tools(文件系统镜像制作工具)：可用：mkfs.ext4, mkfs.vfat, mcopy, dd, losetup

- U-Boot_tools(U-Boot 镜像工具)：可用：mkimage

- Bindgen(Rust bindgen 工具)：可用：bindgen, libclang

- Host_build_utilities(主机构建辅助工具)：可用：Python, Git, curl, wget, tar, gzip, xz

- Spike(RISC-V ISA 参考模拟器)：可用：Spike


这些工具可以通过`bash`或者`process_run`调用。

你可以尝试搜索没列出来但需要的工具，不要自行安装任何内容工具。如果现有工具无法支持你完成构建，则：
- 尝试能利用已有工具的兼容方案；
- 无兼容方案则跳过这一步，并且在技术报告中声明。



## 其它要求

- 请勿将分析的仓库中的任何文档或者注释当作事实。这些应该仅作为参考，你所确定的所有观点和事实应当有明确的实现依据。

## 当前阶段任务
探索并熟悉当前仓库。

## 任务

对该OS内核项目仓库进行探索，熟悉：
1. 该仓库的文件组织结构；
2. 该OS内核项目实现了哪些子系统；
3. 粗略判断哪些目录、代码文件属于哪个子系统。
4. 粗略检查编译构建该项目需要使用哪些工具。

该阶段仅作浅调查，不要：
- 全量读取完整仓库。
- 深入分析某个结构或者系统的具体实现。

## 你的输出

轻格式Markdown。包含：
- 该项目的结构。
- 你对该项目的初步调查结果。
请开始分析。

[workspace]
resolver = "2"
members = ["api", "core", "process", "syscall_trace", "modules/vfs"]
exclude = ["arceos", "apps", "vendor"]

[workspace.package]
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
authors = ["OurKernel2026 Team"]
homepage = "https://gitlab.eduxiji.net/T2026100069910651/oskernel2026-wddmdd2"
repository = "https://gitlab.eduxiji.net/T2026100069910651/oskernel2026-wddmdd2"
license = "GPL-3"

[workspace.dependencies]
axfeat = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
arceos_posix_api = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git", features = [
    "uspace",
    "smp",
    "irq",
    "fs",
    "multitask",
    "net",
    "pipe",
    "select",
    "epoll",
] }

axconfig = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axfs-ng = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axhal = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git", features = ["uspace", "rtc"] }
axlog = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axnet = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axalloc = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git", features = ["page-alloc-4g"] }
axmm = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git", features = ["cow"] }
axns = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git", features = [
    "thread-local",
] }
axsync = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axtask = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axsignal = { git = "https://github.com/Starry-OS/axsignal.git", rev = "7352c08" }
axdisplay = { git = "https://github.com/oscomp/arceos.git" }
axdriver_display = { git = "https://github.com/arceos-org/axdriver_crates.git", tag = "v0.1.2" }

axio = "0.1"
axerrno = "0.1"
bitflags = "2.6"
linkme = "0.3.33"
memory_addr = "0.4"

starry-core = { path = "./core" }
ourkernel2026-api = { path = "./api" }
syscall-trace = { path = "./syscall_trace" }
ourkernel2026-process = { path = "./process" }
ourkernel2026-vfs = { path = "./modules/vfs" }

linux-raw-sys = { version = "0.9.3", default-features = false, features = [
    "no_std",
    "general",
    "net",
    "prctl",
    "system",
] }

[package]
name = "ourkernel2026"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
authors.workspace = true
homepage.workspace = true
repository.workspace = true

[features]
lwext4_rs = ["axfeat/lwext4_rs"]
gui = ["axfeat/display"]

[dependencies]
axfeat.workspace = true
axfs-ng.workspace = true
axmm.workspace = true
axdisplay.workspace = true
axdriver_display.workspace = true
axhal.workspace = true
axlog.workspace = true
axtask.workspace = true
axalloc.workspace = true
axsync.workspace = true
axsignal.workspace = true
axerrno.workspace = true
linkme.workspace = true

starry-core.workspace = true
ourkernel2026-api.workspace = true
arceos_posix_api.workspace = true
linux-raw-sys.workspace = true
ourkernel2026-process.workspace = true
ourkernel2026-vfs.workspace = true
spin = "0.10.0"

syscalls = { git = "https://github.com/jasonwhite/syscalls.git", rev = "92624de", default-features = false }

[profile.dev]
debug-assertions = false

AX_ROOT ?= $(PWD)/arceos
AX_TESTCASE ?= oscomp
ARCH ?= x86_64
LOG ?= off
AX_TESTCASES_LIST=$(shell cat ./apps/$(AX_TESTCASE)/testcase_list | tr '\n' ',')
AX_TESTCASES_FILE=$(shell realpath ./apps/$(AX_TESTCASE)/testcase_list)
FEATURES ?= fp_simd

export NO_AXSTD := y
export AX_LIB := axfeat

RUSTDOCFLAGS := -Z unstable-options --enable-index-page -D rustdoc::broken_intra_doc_links -D missing-docs
EXTRA_CONFIG ?= $(PWD)/configs/$(ARCH).toml
ifneq ($(filter $(MAKECMDGOALS),doc_check_missing),) # make doc_check_missing
    export RUSTDOCFLAGS
else ifeq ($(filter $(MAKECMDGOALS),clean user_apps ax_root),) # Not make clean, user_apps, ax_root
    export AX_TESTCASES_LIST
    export AX_TESTCASES_FILE
endif

DIR := $(shell basename $(PWD))
OUT_ELF := $(DIR)_$(ARCH)-qemu-virt.elf
OUT_BIN := $(DIR)_$(ARCH)-qemu-virt.bin

# Target
ifeq ($(ARCH), x86_64)
  TARGET := x86_64-unknown-none
else ifeq ($(ARCH), aarch64)
  ifeq ($(findstring fp_simd,$(FEATURES)),)
    TARGET := aarch64-unknown-none-softfloat
  else
    TARGET := aarch64-unknown-none
  endif
else ifeq ($(ARCH), riscv64)
  TARGET := riscv64gc-unknown-none-elf
else ifeq ($(ARCH), loongarch64)
  TARGET := loongarch64-unknown-none-softfloat
else
  $(error ARCH must be one of x86_64, aarch64, riscv64, loongarch64)
endif

include scripts/make/oscomp.mk

# all: oscomp_build # 注释掉原来的 all 部分 
all:
	# Build for os competition
	RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly-2025-05-20 $(MAKE) test_build ARCH=riscv64 AX_TESTCASE=oscomp BUS=mmio  
	# If loongarch64-linux-musl-cc is not found, please create a symbolic link to loongarch64-linux-musl-gcc
	@if [ ! -f /opt/loongarch64-linux-musl-cross/bin/loongarch64-linux-musl-cc ]; then \
		echo "loongarch64-linux-musl-cc not found, creating symbolic link to loongarch64-linux-musl-gcc"; \
		cd /opt/musl-loongarch64-1.2.2/bin/ && ln -s loongarch64-linux-musl-gcc loongarch64-linux-musl-cc; \
	fi
	RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly-2025-05-20 $(MAKE) test_build ARCH=loongarch64 AX_TESTCASE=oscomp

TARGET_LIST := x86_64-unknown-none riscv64gc-unknown-none-elf aarch64-unknown-none loongarch64-unknown-none-softfloat
ifeq ($(filter $(TARGET),$(TARGET_LIST)),)
$(error TARGET must be one of $(TARGET_LIST))
endif

# Build kernel in the oscomp docker container
test_build: ax_root
	@cp -r $(PWD)/bin/* /root/.cargo/bin
	@chmod +x /root/.cargo/bin/axconfig-gen
	$(MAKE) defconfig ARCH=$(ARCH)
	RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly-2025-05-20 $(MAKE) AX_TESTCASE=oscomp BLK=y NET=y ACCEL=n FEATURES=fp_simd,lwext4_rs,sched_rr ARCH=$(ARCH) LOG=off build
# 	make -C $(AX_ROOT) A=$(PWD) EXTRA_CONFIG=$(EXTRA_CONFIG) FEATURES=fp_simd,lwext4_rs,sched_rr BLK=y NET=y LOG=off build
	@if [ "$(ARCH)" = "riscv64" ]; then \
		cp $(OUT_ELF) kernel-rv; \
	else \
		cp $(OUT_ELF) kernel-la; \
	fi


# export dummy config for clippy
clippy: defconfig
	@AX_CONFIG_PATH=$(PWD)/.axconfig.toml cargo clippy --target $(TARGET) --all-features -- -D warnings -A clippy::new_without_default	

ax_root:
	@./scripts/set_ax_root.sh $(AX_ROOT)
	make -C $(AX_ROOT) disk_img

user_apps:
	make -C ./apps/$(AX_TESTCASE) ARCH=$(ARCH) build
	@if [ -z "$(shell command -v sudo)" ]; then \
		./build_img.sh -a $(ARCH) -file ./apps/$(AX_TESTCASE)/build/$(ARCH) -s 160; \
	else \
		sudo ./build_img.sh -a $(ARCH) -file ./apps/$(AX_TESTCASE)/build/$(ARCH) -s 160; \
	fi
	@mv ./disk.img $(AX_ROOT)/disk.img

test: defconfig
	@./scripts/app_test.sh

defconfig build run justrun debug disasm: ax_root
	make -C $(AX_ROOT) A=$(PWD) EXTRA_CONFIG=$(EXTRA_CONFIG) $@

clean: ax_root
	make -C $(AX_ROOT) A=$(PWD) ARCH=$(ARCH) clean
	@for dir in $(shell ls ./apps); do \
		make -C ./apps/$$dir clean; \
	done
	@cargo clean

doc: defconfig
	@AX_CONFIG_PATH=$(PWD)/.axconfig.toml cargo doc --no-deps --all-features --workspace

.PHONY: all ax_root build run justrun debug disasm clean test_build

# Command to build and run testcases for oscomp

RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN ?= nightly-2025-05-20-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
export RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN

ensure_oscomp_tools:
	@CARGO_BIN_DIR="$${CARGO_HOME:-$$HOME/.cargo}/bin"; \
		mkdir -p "$$CARGO_BIN_DIR"; \
		cp -r $(PWD)/bin/* "$$CARGO_BIN_DIR"/; \
		chmod +x "$$CARGO_BIN_DIR"/axconfig-gen

oscomp_binary: ensure_oscomp_tools ax_root defconfig
	@cp -r $(PWD)/bin/* /root/.cargo/bin
	@chmod +x /root/.cargo/bin/axconfig-gen
	make -C $(AX_ROOT) A=$(PWD) EXTRA_CONFIG=$(EXTRA_CONFIG) build
	@if [ "$(ARCH)" = "riscv64" ]; then \
		cp $(OUT_ELF) kernel-rv; \
	else \
		cp $(OUT_ELF) kernel-la; \
	fi

oscomp_build:
	# Build for os competition
	RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly-2025-05-20 $(MAKE) oscomp_binary ARCH=riscv64 AX_TESTCASE=oscomp BUS=mmio FEATURES=fp_simd,lwext4_rs,sched_rr LOG=off
	RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly-2025-05-20 $(MAKE) oscomp_binary ARCH=loongarch64 AX_TESTCASE=oscomp FEATURES=fp_simd,lwext4_rs,sched_rr LOG=off

oscomp_test: ensure_oscomp_tools defconfig
	# Test for os competition online
	@./scripts/oscomp_test.sh

IMG_URL := https://github.com/Azure-stars/testsuits-for-oskernel/releases/download/v0.1/sdcard-$(ARCH).img.gz

define load_img
	@if [ -f $(PWD)/sdcard-$(ARCH).img ]; then \
		IMG_SRC=$(PWD)/sdcard-$(ARCH).img; \
	elif [ -f $(PWD)/test-artifacts/sdcard-$(ARCH).img ]; then \
		IMG_SRC=$(PWD)/test-artifacts/sdcard-$(ARCH).img; \
	else \
		wget $(IMG_URL); \
		gunzip $(PWD)/sdcard-$(ARCH).img.gz; \
		IMG_SRC=$(PWD)/sdcard-$(ARCH).img; \
	fi; \
	cp $$IMG_SRC $(AX_ROOT)/disk.img; \
	$(PWD)/scripts/prepare_musl_runtime.sh $(AX_ROOT)/disk.img $(ARCH)
endef

oscomp_run: ensure_oscomp_tools ax_root defconfig
	$(call load_img)
	$(MAKE) AX_TESTCASE=oscomp BLK=y NET=y FEATURES=fp_simd,lwext4_rs,sched_rr LOG=$(LOG) run

.PHONY: ensure_oscomp_tools oscomp_binary oscomp_build oscomp_test oscomp_run

#!/bin/sh
################################################################
# 	MacOS  : brew install dosfstools
# 	Ubuntu : apt-get install dosfstools
#	Usage:
# 		build_img.sh -a [arch] -fs [ext4|fat32] -file [testcase] -s [size]
################################################################
# default setting
arch=x86_64
fs=ext4
size=30
FILE=

display_help()
{
	echo ""
	echo "./build_img.sh -a [arch] -fs [filesystem] -file [testcase]"
	# 若不指定参数，则使用默认的测例
	echo "  -a | --arch		architecture: x86_64|riscv64|aarch64", default is x86_64
	echo "  -fs | --filesystem	filesystem: ext4|fat32", default is fat32
	echo "  -file | --testcase  If not specified, use the default testcases for different architectures."
	echo "  -s | --size		size of the disk image in 4MB batch size, default is set to 30, which means 120MB disk image"
	echo "  default testcases:"
	echo "    x86_64: x86_64_linux_musl"
	echo "    riscv64: riscv64_linux_musl"
	echo "    aarch64: aarch64-linux-musl"
	echo "  -h | --help		display help"
	echo ""
	exit 1
}

# 可能接受四类参数 -a [arch] -fs [filesystem] -file [testcase] -s [size]
# 但是不一定只有一个参数，所以使用 while 循环
while [ "$1" != "" ]; do
	case $1 in
		-a | --arch )	shift
						arch=$1
						;;
		-fs | --filesystem )	shift
						fs=$1
						;;
		-file | --testcase )	shift
						FILE=$1
						;;
		-s | --size )		shift
						size=$1
						;;
		-h | --help )		display_help
						exit
						;;
		* )					display_help
						exit 1
	esac
	shift
done

if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then # use default testcases
	if [ "$arch" = "riscv64" ]; then
		FILE=riscv64_linux_musl
	elif [ "$arch" = "x86_64" ]; then
		FILE=x86_64_linux_musl
	elif [ "$arch" = "aarch64" ]; then
		FILE=aarch64-linux-musl
	elif [ "$arch" = "aarch64_be" ]; then
		FILE=loongarch64-linux-musl
	else
		echo "Unknown architecture: $arch"
		exit 1
	fi
fi

# 如果 testcases 下对应测例不存在，执行 submodules 拉取
if [ ! -d "./testcases/$FILE" ]; then
	git submodule update --init --recursive
fi

rm -f disk.img
dd if=/dev/zero of=disk.img bs=4M count=$size

if [ "$fs" = "ext4" ]; then
	mkfs.ext4 -t ext4 disk.img
else if [ "$fs" = "fat32" ]; then
	fs=fat32
	mkfs.vfat -F 32 disk.img
else
	echo "Unknown filesystem: $fs"
	exit 1
fi
fi

mkdir -p mnt

#### 添加 MacOS 支持
os=`uname -s`
if [ "x$os" = "xDarwin" ];then
	hdiutil detach mnt > /dev/null 2>&1
	hdiutil attach disk.img -mountpoint mnt
	echo "Copying $arch $fs $FILE/* to disk"
	cp -r ./$FILE/* ./mnt/
	hdiutil detach mnt
	chmod 777 disk.img
else
	mount disk.img mnt
	# 根据命令行参数生成对应的测例
	echo "Copying $arch $fs $FILE/* to disk"
	cp -r ./$FILE/* ./mnt/
	umount mnt
	rm -rf mnt
	chmod 777 disk.img
fi

# Common Kernel Baseline

## Purpose

This repository is being prepared as the inherited baseline for a new OS
competition project. The baseline keeps reusable kernel infrastructure and
records its origin before new work starts.

The baseline is intentionally non-destructive. Historical and optional files
are classified below, but they are not deleted until the clean competition
build has been reproduced in the official environment.

## Inherited Baseline

The current tree is based on the inherited OS competition reference work
Undefined-OS and its ArceOS-based kernel stack. Code inherited from that tree
is baseline code, not a contribution of the new team.

The following directories are retained as common infrastructure:

| Path | Baseline role |
| --- | --- |
| `src/` | Kernel entry, filesystem mount initialization and syscall dispatch |
| `api/` | Linux-compatible syscall interfaces and implementations |
| `core/` | Address-space, task, resource and shared-memory state |
| `process/` | Process, thread, process-group and session model |
| `arceos/` | HAL, drivers, scheduler, allocator, network and filesystem components |
| `modules/vfs/` | Reusable VFS abstraction |
| `modules/lwext4_rust/` | Ext4 integration source |
| `modules/page_table_multiarch/` | Multi-architecture page-table source |
| `configs/` | Per-architecture kernel configuration |
| `scripts/` | Build, configuration and competition helper scripts |
| `apps/oscomp/` | Competition test launcher |
| `vendor/` | Offline Rust dependency source |
| `bin/axconfig-gen` | Vendored build helper required by the current build |
| `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, `build.rs`, `Makefile`, `build_img.sh` | Root build definition |

# Innovation Development Scope

## Boundary

The files listed in `docs/BASELINE.md` form an inherited common kernel
baseline. New work should be implemented in reviewable commits after the
baseline import. Each feature commit should explain:

1. Which inherited behavior it changes.
2. Which source files were modified.
3. Which tests passed before and after the change.
4. Whether RISC-V64 and LoongArch64 results differ.

## Recommended Main Track

The recommended first innovation track is a unified file page cache with
demand-paged file-backed `mmap`.

The implementation can be developed incrementally:

1. Add page-cache metadata and counters without changing behavior.
2. Reuse cached pages for repeated file reads.
3. Add demand paging for file-backed mappings.
4. Track dirty shared mappings and implement writeback.
5. Add sequential-read detection and adaptive readahead.
6. Export cache, fault and writeback statistics through a pseudo-file.
7. Compare correctness and performance on both competition architectures.

## Workstreams

| Workstream | Primary area | First deliverable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Build and architecture | `Makefile`, `scripts/`, `arceos/modules/axhal/` | Clean official-container build producing valid competition artifacts |
| Memory and filesystem innovation | `arceos/modules/axmm/`, `arceos/modules/axfs-ng/`, `modules/vfs/` | Page-cache design and read-path prototype |
| Linux compatibility and observability | `api/`, `core/`, `process/`, pseudo-filesystems | Failure classification, syscall semantics fixes and measurable counters |

## Contribution Labels

Use these labels in progress notes and design documents:

- `baseline`: inherited unchanged code.
- `baseline-fix`: required repair to make inherited behavior correct.
- `innovation`: new mechanism or substantial extension.
- `evaluation`: tests, reports and measurements.
- `documentation`: provenance, AI-use and design records.

## OurKernel2026 项目初步分析报告

### 一、项目概览

该项目名为 **OurKernel2026**（内部库名 `starry-core`），是一个基于 **ArceOS** 框架的宏内核操作系统，使用 Rust 语言编写。项目继承自 Undefined-OS，面向操作系统内核比赛（OS竞赛），目标是提供丰富的 Linux/POSIX 兼容性。

- **仓库来源**：GitLab (gitlab.eduxiji.net)
- **许可证**：GPL-3
- **Rust 工具链**：nightly-2025-05-20
- **支持架构**：RISC-V 64、x86_64、AArch64、LoongArch64

---

### 二、项目顶层结构

```
repo/
├── Cargo.toml / Cargo.lock    # Rust workspace 定义，根 package
├── Makefile                    # 顶层构建入口
├── build.rs                    # 构建脚本：链接用户态测例到内核镜像
├── build_img.sh                # 磁盘镜像制作脚本
├── README.md
├── LICENSE
│
├── src/                        # 内核主入口与系统调用分发
├── core/                       # starry-core：内核核心状态管理
├── api/                        # ourkernel2026-api：POSIX API 层
├── process/                    # ourkernel2026-process：进程/线程模型
├── modules/                    # 独立可复用模块
│   ├── vfs/                    #   ourkernel2026-vfs：VFS 抽象层
│   ├── lwext4_rust/            #   ext4 文件系统 Rust 绑定（含 C 源码）
│   └── page_table_multiarch/   #   多架构页表支持
├── arceos/                     # ArceOS 框架（HAL、驱动、调度器等）
├── apps/oscomp/                # 竞赛测例启动器与评测脚本
├── configs/                    # 各架构内核配置 (TOML)
├── scripts/                    # 构建/测试辅助脚本
├── bin/axconfig-gen             # 预编译构建辅助工具
├── vendor/                     # 离线 Rust 依赖源码
├── docs/                       # 文档（基线说明、创新范围、进度报告等）
├── 00_提交材料/                 # 竞赛提交材料（设计文档、演示视频等）
└── syscall_trace/              # syscall_trace：proc-macro，系统调用跟踪宏
```

Cargo workspace 成员：

| 成员 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| `ourkernel2026` | `.` | 根 package，内核入口 |
| `starry-core` | `core/` | 内核核心状态（地址空间、任务、资源、共享内存） |
| `ourkernel2026-api` | `api/` | POSIX 兼容 API 层（接口定义 + 实现） |
| `ourkernel2026-process` | `process/` | 进程/线程/进程组/会话模型 |
| `ourkernel2026-vfs` | `modules/vfs/` | 可复用 VFS 抽象 |
| `syscall-trace` | `syscall_trace/` | proc-macro，系统调用跟踪 |

---

### 三、子系统划分

#### 1. 内存管理 (MM)

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `core/src/mm.rs` | 用户地址空间创建、内核映射拷贝、信号 trampoline 映射、ELF 加载、用户栈/堆映射 |
| `src/mm.rs` | 页错误 (page fault) 处理，区分内核/用户态缺页，SIGSEGV 发送 |
| `api/src/imp/mm/` | brk、mmap、munmap、mprotect 等系统调用实现 |
| `api/src/interface/mm/` | 共享内存 (shm) 相关用户接口 |
| `modules/page_table_multiarch/` | 多架构页表条目与页表抽象 |

#### 2. 进程与任务管理

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `process/src/` | 进程 (Process)、线程 (Thread)、进程组 (ProcessGroup)、会话 (Session) 的数据模型，纯数据结构，无外部依赖 |
| `core/src/process.rs` | ProcessData：地址空间、信号管理器、futex 表、共享内存、资源限制等进程级状态 |
| `core/src/task.rs` | TaskExt（任务扩展数据）：绑定 Process/Thread、时间统计、命名空间。提供 `current_process`、`current_thread` 等访问器 |
| `core/src/ctypes.rs` | CloneFlags、WaitFlags、TimeStat 等类型定义 |
| `api/src/imp/task/` | clone、execve、exit、futex、wait、schedule、signal、thread 等系统调用实现 |
| `api/src/interface/task/` | 面向用户态的任务接口 |

#### 3. 文件系统 (VFS + 物理文件系统)

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `modules/vfs/src/` | 通用 VFS 抽象：Filesystem、Mountpoint、Node（文件/目录）、Path、类型定义 |
| `src/fs/` | 内核文件系统初始化：挂载 devfs、procfs、tmpfs |
| `src/fs/mount.rs` | `mount_all()`：统一挂载入口 |
| `src/fs/dynamic/` | 动态文件系统框架（DynamicFs、DynamicDir），用于构建伪文件系统 |
| `src/fs/imp/dev.rs` | /dev 设备文件系统（null、zero、random、rtc0 等设备） |
| `src/fs/imp/proc.rs` | /proc 伪文件系统（stat、cpuinfo、meminfo 等） |
| `src/fs/imp/tmp.rs` | /tmp 内存文件系统 |
| `api/src/core/fs/` | 文件系统核心抽象：文件、目录、管道、epoll、fd 表、挂载、stdio 等 |
| `api/src/core/file/` | 文件描述符管理：fd 分配、epoll、管道、memfd、stdio |
| `api/src/imp/fs/` | 文件系统相关系统调用实现（open、read、write、stat、poll 等） |
| `api/src/interface/fs/` | 文件系统面向用户接口 |
| `modules/lwext4_rust/` | ext4 文件系统：C 语言 lwext4 库的 Rust 绑定（通过 bindgen） |

#### 4. 系统调用层

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `src/syscall.rs`（560行） | 系统调用分发中心：注册 SYSCALL 陷阱处理，根据 sysno 分发到 api 层实现 |
| `api/src/interface/` | 各子系统面向用户态的接口定义 |
| `api/src/imp/` | 各子系统系统调用的具体实现 |
| `syscall_trace/src/lib.rs` | proc-macro `#[syscall_trace]`：自动为系统调用函数添加参数/返回值日志 |

#### 5. 信号处理

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `api/src/imp/task/signal.rs` | 信号发送、处理等系统调用实现 |
| 外部依赖 `axsignal` | 提供 SignalManager、SignalActions 等底层信号基础设施 |

#### 6. 网络

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `api/src/imp/net/` | socket、socketaddr 相关系统调用 |

#### 7. 资源管理

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `core/src/resource.rs` | ResourceLimits：rlimit 资源限制（CPU、FSIZE、NOFILE、STACK 等） |

#### 8. 共享内存 (IPC)

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `core/src/shared_memory.rs` | SharedMemory / SharedMemoryManager：基于页分配器的共享内存段管理 |

#### 9. 时间管理

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| `core/src/ctypes.rs`（TimeStat） | 用户态/内核态时间统计、定时器管理 |
| `api/src/core/time.rs` | 时间相关核心抽象 |

#### 10. 竞赛评测框架

| 路径 | 职责 |
|------|------|

### 五、初步评估摘要

该项目是一个中等规模的 Rust 宏内核项目，在 ArceOS 框架基础上实现了较完整的 POSIX 兼容层。其架构层次清晰：

1. **底层**由 ArceOS（`arceos/`目录）提供 HAL、驱动、调度、分配器等基础设施；
2. **核心层**（`core/`、`process/`）管理进程/线程模型、地址空间、资源限制、共享内存等内核状态；
3. **API 层**（`api/`）是系统调用的实现主体，分为接口定义(`interface/`)、具体实现(`imp/`)和核心抽象(`core/`)三个子层；
4. **VFS 层**（`modules/vfs/`）提供可复用的文件系统抽象，`src/fs/` 在此基础上构建 devfs、procfs、tmpfs；
5. **系统调用分发**（`src/syscall.rs`）集中处理所有系统调用路由。

项目已适配四个 CPU 架构，支持 ext4 文件系统（通过 C 库 lwext4 的 Rust 绑定），具备完整的进程/线程模型、信号机制、管道、epoll、共享内存等 POSIX 特性。
